name: telemetry baseline: /doctor compares current measured tokens-per-turn against pinned baseline; >20% drift surfaces a warning
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"skills":{"x":{"tokens_per_turn":1000}}}' > .claude-tdd-pro/telemetry-baseline.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check telemetry-drift --simulate-current-tokens 1500 2>out.txt && grep -E 'drift.*50%' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
